goal: Retire /probe/sandbox-write as a permitless sandbox write route while leaving the proven SmartPush permit path untouched.
scope_out: Do not add new permit logic to sandboxWrite.ts.
Do not modify the SmartPush permit path or Maya gate client.
Do not perform a live GitHub write.
Do not change Render environment variables or Maya-core enforcement flags.
Do not implement Codex as an executor in this task.
claims: /probe/sandbox-write returns HTTP 410 regardless of method, body, or environment flags.
The /probe/sandbox-write handler contains no GitHub content write or delete execution body.
BLUEPILOT_SANDBOX_PERMIT_WRITE_ENABLED no longer activates any content-write route in builder/src.
assumptions: BP-147 already provides the live proof for a permit-gated sandbox write.
The current BP-149 route is a permitless side door and should not be kept as a fallback.
If a governed sandbox probe is needed later, it should be built as a separate policy/permit path through SmartPush.
dod: builder/src/sandboxWrite.ts is a small 410 Gone stub and does not import GitHub write helpers.
builder/tests/sandboxWrite.test.ts proves POST and GET return 410 and malformed bodies do not reach old validation/write behavior.
A grep check shows no BLUEPILOT_SANDBOX_PERMIT_WRITE_ENABLED reference in builder/src.
A grep check shows no putFileContent/outboundFetch/deleteSandboxFile write path in builder/src/sandboxWrite.ts.
review-packets/BP-150.md records the Claude/Codex correction, caller scan, verification, and BP-149 contract drift.
npm test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: Any change to SmartPush permit behavior becomes necessary.
Any live write becomes necessary for verification.
Any automated non-test caller for /probe/sandbox-write is found and needs a replacement in the same task.
prior_task_findings: Codex review found that BP-149 reopened a permitless /probe/sandbox-write route after BP-147 proved the permit path and BP-148 defused legacy bypasses. This task closes that side door without touching the proven SmartPush permit path.
